channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-NBA player, 'Survivor' contestant Scot Pollard makes contact with heart donor's family
item.description: One of the first things that former NBA player and “Survivor” contestant Scot Pollard made sure to do after receiving a heart transplant was to write down his feelings when they were fresh, in the hopes that he would someday share them with the donor’s family.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NCAA's $2.78 billion settlement with colleges to allow athlete payments gets preliminary approval
item.description: A judge granted preliminary approval Monday to the $2.78 billion legal settlement that would transform college sports by allowing schools to pay players. U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Browns are in 'the worst situation in pro sports,' ex-NFL quarterback says
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Dan Orlovsky described the Cleveland Browns as being in "the worst situation in pro sports" on Monday after their latest loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA's $2.78 billion settlement with colleges to allow athlete payments gets preliminary approval
item.description: A judge has given preliminary approval to the $2.78 billion legal settlement that figures to transform college sports.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Guardians replace injured Tyler Freeman with Ángel Martínez ahead of Game 2 against Tigers
item.description: Guardians utilityman Tyler Freeman sustained an oblique injury during a simulated game Sunday and was dropped from the AL Division Series roster prior to Cleveland hosting Detroit in Game 2.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Patriots captain Jabrill Peppers arrested on assault, strangulation, drug charges
item.description: BRAINTREE, Mass. (AP) — Patriots captain Jabrill Peppers was arrested over the weekend on assault, strangulation and other charges, with police saying Peppers attacked a girlfriend after she received a phone call while they were in bed together.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — A 27-car crash that involved eight of NASCAR's 12 title contenders. A chaotic cleanup that infuriated competitors. And a surprise winner. Just a regular race at Talladega Superspeedway. Ricky Stenhouse Jr.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs. Panthers: What to know for Sunday's Week 5 matchup at Soldier Field
item.description: Carolina (1-3) at Chicago (2-2) Sunday, Noon, Fox UPDATE: The Bears announced their list of inactives, via their X feed. They are WR Velus Jones Jr., FB Khari Blasingame, DL Zacch Pickens, DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominique Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James reveals why he joined the Lakers
item.description: The NBA season is right around the corner, but the league's oldest player still had some time on his hands on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Padres restricting Dodgers fans from buying NLDS tickets in San Diego
item.description: There's a controversy brewing over tickets for the 2024 MLB playoffs. The San Diego Padres are restricting Los Angeles Dodgers fans from buying NLDS tickets for the games in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Lewis, KTLA 5

item.title: Ludmila scores in third straight game as Chicago Red Stars down Houston Dash 2-0
item.description: Ludmila scored a goal and earned a penalty shot as the Chicago Red Stars beat the Houston Dash 2-0 on Friday night at Shell Energy Stadium. Ludmila headed in Mallory Pugh's free kick in the 8th minute to get things started. It was the third straight game she had scored a goal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sitake wants to keep BYU hungry during bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 34-28 win at Baylor, #17 BYU is 5-0 for the first time in three years. But head coach Kalani Sitake is going to make sure his team keeps its underdog mentality during the bye week. "That's our job," Sitake said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
